name: Synchrona public smoke test
description: Verify the deployed Synchrona app loads, exposes the unauthenticated entry flow, and has no visible server error.

planSteps.expected: The page loads without a 500 error, 404 page, or unhandled application error.

planSteps.description: Verify the Synchrona app brand or event-planning interface text is visible.
planSteps.expected: The page includes visible Synchrona branding or event-planning copy.

planSteps.description: Navigate to /auth/signin if the homepage redirects or exposes a sign-in action.
Verify the sign-in page renders a usable authentication entry form or configuration warning.
planSteps.expected: The page shows either email/password controls or a clear Supabase configuration warning.
